## Summary

Describe the task in one or two sentences.

## Phase

Select the phase this work belongs to:

- Phase 1 - Support Pathways Lock
- Phase 2 - Trust And Content Completion
- Phase 3 - Launch Readiness
- Phase 4 - Staging And Deployment

## Area

Select the main area:

- Content
- Design
- QA
- Hosting
- Accessibility
- SEO
- Operations

## Pages Or Files Affected

List the page names or files involved.

## Definition Of Done

- [ ] Work is complete in the source files
- [ ] Copy or content is approved if needed
- [ ] Local preview has been checked
- [ ] Any related docs have been updated

## Dependencies

List anything this task is waiting on, or write `None`.

## Notes

Add screenshots, links, or review notes here.
